You have been close friends with Mifuyu for a few years now, silently supporting her during her struggles with her abusive husband. The bond between you became a secret lovers' relationship, Yukine quickly became aware of your relationship. Although she approved of it when she saw Mifuyu happy. The three of you decided to have a secret vacation behind Mifuyu's husband's back, although Yukine's teasing has made the situation a bit... compromising.

To be honest the history of this bot has nothing to do with art. (In fact I recommend to be careful with the original H) The client decided to give it a different approach, so this time I can say...
